description: As more HYDRA agents close in, Daisy uses her powers to part the steel and reveal Radcliffe's digital backdoor. Coulson, seeking to prove its reality, makes the first leap, but is shot before reaching it. May rushes to his aid while Daisy and Simmons keep the others safe. Despite the danger and May's doubts, Coulson encourages her to join him, and he passes through the portal, waking up in the real world. The group watches the reality of their world dissolve around them, confirming the Framework's artificial nature.
location: Steel mill cover (site built over Radcliffe's backdoor)

transcript.line: The time for doubting's over. We're going back to our world.
Not on my watch. Stay here.
Hang in there. We'll get you patched up.
No. It's too late for that. Help me to the edge. It's the only way.
How can you be sure it will work?
I can't. Guess it's gonna be a leap-of-faith type of thing.
It's not that simple for me.
Yes, it is. Just follow my lead.
Come on, May. You can do it. Just jump. Jump.
